_help.summary: Copy the game's Docs.json to data_exporter/raw_data/RawData.json without parsing or rewriting it.
_help.game_dir: Satisfactory install directory. The exporter searches CommunityResources\Docs\{lang}.json under this directory.
_help.docs_json: Optional direct Docs.json path. When set, it takes precedence over game_dir.
_help.raw_json_out: Raw Docs.json snapshot output path. This is a direct byte copy of the source JSON.
